 {"id":"brenner_bot-reew","title":"EPIC: Session Experience & UI - Orchestration, State Machines, Progress","description":"# Session Experience & UI - Orchestration, State Machines, Progress

## Purpose
Design and implement the user experience for running complete Brenner Loop sessions, from hypothesis intake through final research brief.

## The Session Flow

### Phase Progression
```
intake → sharpening → level_split → exclusion_test → 
object_transpose → scale_check → agent_dispatch → 
synthesis → evidence_gathering → revision → complete
```

Not all phases are required. User can:
- Skip operators that don't apply
- Jump directly to synthesis if operators completed
- Return to earlier phases to revise

### State Machine
```typescript
type SessionPhase =
  | 'intake'           // Initial hypothesis entry
  | 'sharpening'       // Socratic refinement
  | 'level_split'      // Σ operator
  | 'exclusion_test'   // ⊘ operator
  | 'object_transpose' // ⟳ operator
  | 'scale_check'      // ⊙ operator
  | 'agent_dispatch'   // Send to tribunal
  | 'synthesis'        // Aggregate responses
  | 'evidence_gathering' // Record tests & results
  | 'revision'         // Update hypothesis
  | 'complete';        // Generate final brief

interface SessionState {
  phase: SessionPhase;
  hypothesis: HypothesisCard;
  operatorResults: Partial<Record<OperatorType, OperatorResult>>;
  agentResponses: AgentResponse[];
  evidenceEntries: EvidenceEntry[];
  artifacts: GeneratedArtifact[];
  
  // Navigation
  canGoBack: boolean;
  canGoForward: boolean;
  availablePhases: SessionPhase[];
}
```

## UI Components

### Session Dashboard
Main view showing:
- Current phase (highlighted in timeline)
- Hypothesis card (always visible, editable in some phases)
- Phase-specific content area
- Progress indicators
- Quick actions

### Phase Timeline
Horizontal or vertical timeline showing:
- Completed phases (checkmark)
- Current phase (highlighted)
- Available phases (active)
- Skipped phases (dimmed)
- Locked phases (grayed out)

### Hypothesis Card Component
Always-visible card showing:
- Current statement
- Confidence score
- Version number
- Quick edit capability
- Evolution history popup

### Operator Panel
For each operator:
- Guided step-by-step UI
- Generated content display
- User selection/input areas
- Brenner quote sidebar

### Agent Tribunal Panel
Shows:
- Agent status (pending/running/complete)
- Response previews
- Expandable full responses
- Conflict/agreement indicators

### Evidence Ledger Panel
Displays:
- Timeline of tests
- Add new evidence button
- Confidence chart
- Robustness assessment

## Mobile Considerations
Session experience should work on tablet/mobile:
- Phase timeline becomes vertical
- Cards stack vertically
- Agent responses in accordion
- Full functionality preserved

## Keyboard Navigation
Power users should be able to:
- Navigate phases with arrow keys
- Trigger actions with shortcuts
- Jump to specific phases

## Persistence
Sessions auto-save:
- Every state change persisted
- Resume from where you left off
- No explicit save button needed

## Dependencies
- All other epics (orchestrates them all)

## Success Criteria
- Users can complete full sessions smoothly
- Progress is always clear
- Navigation is intuitive
- Mobile experience is usable
- Sessions survive browser refresh

 {"id":"brenner_bot-reew.1","title":"Design Session Dashboard Layout","description":"# Design Session Dashboard Layout

## Purpose
Create the main session dashboard layout that users see during active sessions.

## Layout Design
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  BrennerBot Lab                               [Session: SM-001] │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ [Intake] → [Split] → [Exclude] → [Transpose] → [Scale] │   │
│  │    ●         ●         ◐            ○            ○      │   │
│  │ complete  complete  current      locked       locked    │   │
│  │                                                         │   │
│  │ → [Agents] → [Evidence] → [Synthesis] → [Brief]        │   │
│  │      ○           ○            ○           ○             │   │
│  │   locked      locked       locked      locked           │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                 │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────┐ ┌───────────────────────┐   │
│  │ CURRENT PHASE                 │ │ HYPOTHESIS CARD       │   │
│  │ ══════════════                │ │ ═══════════════       │   │
│  │                               │ │                       │   │
│  │ Exclusion Test (⊘)            │ │ H₂ (v3)      47%     │   │
│  │                               │ │                       │   │
│  │ "What would prove you wrong?" │ │ "Algorithm-driven..." │   │
│  │                               │ │                       │   │
│  │ [Phase-specific content]      │ │ [Edit] [History]      │   │
│  │                               │ │                       │   │
│  │                               │ └───────────────────────┘   │
│  │                               │                             │
│  │                               │ ┌───────────────────────┐   │
│  │                               │ │ 💬 BRENNER SAYS       │   │
│  │                               │ │                       │   │
│  │                               │ │ "Not merely unlikely  │   │
│  │                               │ │  — impossible..."     │   │
│  │                               │ │          — §89        │   │
│  └───────────────────────────────┘ └───────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                 │
│  [← Previous]                                      [Next →]     │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Key Components
1. **Phase Timeline**: Shows progress through session
2. **Phase Content Area**: Main interactive area
3. **Hypothesis Card**: Always-visible summary
4. **Brenner Sidebar**: Contextual quotes
5. **Navigation**: Previous/Next controls

## Responsive Behavior
- **Desktop**: Side-by-side layout as shown
- **Tablet**: Stacked layout, hypothesis card collapsible
- **Mobile**: Single column, cards in accordion

## File Location
`apps/web/src/components/brenner-loop/SessionDashboard.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Layout clear and intuitive
- [ ] All key information visible
- [ ] Responsive across devices
- [ ] Phase switching is smooth

 {"id":"brenner_bot-reew.2","title":"Build Phase Timeline Component","description":"# Build Phase Timeline Component

## Purpose
Create the visual timeline showing session phases and progress.

## Phase Flow
```
intake → sharpening → level_split → exclusion_test → 
object_transpose → scale_check → agent_dispatch → 
synthesis → evidence_gathering → revision → complete
```

## Visual States
- **Complete**: Filled circle (●), green
- **Current**: Half-filled (◐), blue, highlighted
- **Available**: Empty circle (○), gray, clickable
- **Locked**: Dimmed circle, no interaction
- **Skipped**: Strikethrough, dimmed

## Component API
```typescript
interface PhaseTimelineProps {
  phases: SessionPhase[];
  currentPhase: SessionPhase;
  completedPhases: SessionPhase[];
  availablePhases: SessionPhase[];
  skippedPhases: SessionPhase[];
  onPhaseClick: (phase: SessionPhase) => void;
}
```

## Responsive Behavior
- **Desktop**: Horizontal timeline with labels
- **Tablet**: Horizontal timeline, abbreviated labels
- **Mobile**: Vertical timeline or stepper

## Keyboard Navigation
- Arrow keys to navigate phases
- Enter to select phase
- Visual focus indicator

## Animation
- Smooth transition between phases
- Completion animation (checkmark appear)
- Progress indicator animation

## File Location
`apps/web/src/components/brenner-loop/PhaseTimeline.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All phase states displayed correctly
- [ ] Phase switching works
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Responsive layout works
- [ ] Animations are smooth

-{"id":"brenner_bot-reew.3","title":"Implement Session State Machine","description":"# Implement Session State Machine

## Purpose
Create a formal state machine that governs session phase transitions.

## Why a State Machine
Session progression has complex rules:
- Some phases depend on others
- Some phases can be skipped
- Some phases can be revisited
- Invalid transitions should be impossible

A state machine makes this explicit and prevents bugs.

## State Definition
```typescript
const sessionMachine = createMachine({
  id: 'session',
  initial: 'intake',
  
  states: {
    intake: {
      on: { SUBMIT_HYPOTHESIS: 'sharpening' }
    },
    
    sharpening: {
      on: {
        REFINE: 'sharpening',  // Stay and refine more
        CONTINUE: 'level_split',
        SKIP_OPERATORS: 'agent_dispatch'
      }
    },
    
    level_split: {
      on: {
        COMPLETE: 'exclusion_test',
        SKIP: 'exclusion_test',
        BACK: 'sharpening'
      }
    },
    
    exclusion_test: {
      on: {
        COMPLETE: 'object_transpose',
        SKIP: 'object_transpose',
        BACK: 'level_split'
      }
    },
    
    object_transpose: {
      on: {
        COMPLETE: 'scale_check',
        SKIP: 'scale_check',
        BACK: 'exclusion_test'
      }
    },
    
    scale_check: {
      on: {
        COMPLETE: 'agent_dispatch',
        SKIP: 'agent_dispatch',
        BACK: 'object_transpose'
      }
    },
    
    agent_dispatch: {
      on: {
        RESPONSES_RECEIVED: 'synthesis',
        SKIP_AGENTS: 'evidence_gathering',
        BACK: 'scale_check'
      }
    },
    
    synthesis: {
      on: {
        CONTINUE: 'evidence_gathering',
        BACK: 'agent_dispatch'
      }
    },
    
    evidence_gathering: {
      on: {
        ADD_EVIDENCE: 'evidence_gathering',
        REVISE_HYPOTHESIS: 'revision',
        COMPLETE: 'complete',
        BACK: 'synthesis'
      }
    },
    
    revision: {
      on: {
        SAVE: 'evidence_gathering',
        RESTART_OPERATORS: 'level_split'
      }
    },
    
    complete: {
      type: 'final'
    }
  }
});
```

## Integration
Use XState or similar, or custom implementation:
```typescript
function useSessionMachine(initialState: SessionPhase) {
  // Returns current state, available transitions, send function
}
```

## File Location
`apps/web/src/lib/brenner-loop/session-machine.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All states and transitions defined
- [ ] Invalid transitions impossible
- [ ] State persists with session
- [ ] Hook provides clean API

## Why a State Machine

```typescript
const sessionMachine = createMachine({
  id: 'session',

      type: 'final'
    }
  }
});
```

## Integration
Use XState or similar, or custom implementation:
```typescript

  // Returns current state, available transitions, send function
}
```

## File Location
`apps/web/src/lib/brenner-loop/session-machine.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All states and transitions defined
- [ ] Invalid transitions impossible
- [ ] State persists with session
- [ ] Hook provides clean API

 {"id":"brenner_bot-reew.4","title":"Create Session List & Management Page","description":"# Create Session List & Management Page

## Purpose
Build the page where users see all their sessions and can create new ones.

## Page Layout
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  BrennerBot Lab                           [+ New Session]       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│  Your Research Sessions                                         │
│  ═══════════════════════                                        │
│                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ SM-2024-003                              2 hours ago    │   │
│  │ "Algorithm-driven content causes teen depression"       │   │
│  │ Phase: Evidence Gathering │ Confidence: 37% │ v3        │   │
│  │ [Continue] [Export] [Delete]                            │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ SM-2024-002                              1 day ago      │   │
│  │ "Meditation reduces anxiety through attention training"  │   │
│  │ Phase: Complete │ Confidence: 72% │ v2                  │   │
│  │ [View Brief] [Export] [Delete]                          │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ SM-2024-001                              3 days ago     │   │
│  │ "Remote work improves productivity"                     │   │
│  │ Phase: Exclusion Test │ Confidence: 65% │ v1            │   │
│  │ [Continue] [Export] [Delete]                            │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                 │
│  [Load More]                                                    │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Features

### Session Card
Shows:
- Session ID
- Hypothesis preview
- Current phase
- Confidence score
- Last updated
- Quick actions

### Filtering & Sorting
- Sort by: Date, Confidence, Phase
- Filter by: Status (active, complete), Confidence range

### Actions
- **Continue**: Resume in-progress session
- **View Brief**: For complete sessions
- **Export**: Download as Markdown/PDF/JSON
- **Delete**: With confirmation

### New Session Flow
Click "+ New Session" → Hypothesis Intake form

## Route
`/lab` or `/sessions`

## File Location
`apps/web/src/app/lab/page.tsx`
`apps/web/src/components/brenner-loop/SessionCard.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sessions listed with all info
- [ ] Sorting and filtering work
- [ ] Actions work correctly
- [ ] Delete has confirmation
- [ ] Pagination/infinite scroll works

 {"id":"brenner_bot-reew.5","title":"Implement Mobile-Responsive Session Experience","description":"# Implement Mobile-Responsive Session Experience

## Purpose
Ensure the full session experience works well on mobile devices.

## Mobile Challenges
1. Limited horizontal space
2. Touch-based interaction
3. Keyboard covers content
4. Multiple panels don't fit side-by-side

## Mobile Adaptations

### Phase Timeline
- Switch to vertical stepper
- Or compact horizontal with icons only
- Swipe to navigate phases

### Session Dashboard
- Stack panels vertically
- Hypothesis card as collapsible header
- Brenner quotes in expandable section

### Operator Sessions
- Full-width content area
- Step navigation via swipe or buttons
- Quote sidebar becomes bottom sheet

### Agent Tribunal
- Agents in accordion/tabs
- One agent visible at a time
- Expand to see full response

### Evidence Recording
- Full-screen modal
- Multi-step as swipeable pages

## Implementation Approach
- Use Tailwind responsive utilities
- Consider mobile-first CSS
- Test on real devices

## Touch Interactions
- Swipe to navigate
- Long-press for context menus
- Pull-to-refresh for agent updates

## File Location
Various components with responsive variants.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All phases work on mobile
- [ ] No horizontal scrolling required
- [ ] Touch interactions feel native
- [ ] Text is readable
- [ ] Actions are tappable

 {"id":"brenner_bot-reew.6","title":"Add Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility","description":"# Add Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility

## Purpose
Make the session experience fully accessible via keyboard and screen readers.

## Keyboard Navigation

### Global Shortcuts
- `?`: Show keyboard shortcuts
- `Esc`: Close modal/go back
- `Cmd/Ctrl + S`: Save session
- `Cmd/Ctrl + E`: Export

### Phase Navigation
- `←` `→`: Previous/Next phase
- `1-9`: Jump to phase by number
- `Tab`: Navigate within phase

### Within Forms
- `Tab`: Next field
- `Shift+Tab`: Previous field
- `Enter`: Submit/Continue
- `Space`: Toggle checkboxes

### Hypothesis Card
- `E`: Edit hypothesis
- `H`: View history
- `V`: Expand/collapse

## Focus Management
- Clear focus indicators (visible rings)
- Focus trapped in modals
- Focus restored after modal close
- Skip links for screen readers

## Screen Reader Support
- Semantic HTML (headings, landmarks)
- ARIA labels for interactive elements
- Live regions for dynamic updates
- Descriptive alt text

## Color Contrast
- All text meets WCAG AA
- States distinguishable without color
- High contrast mode support

## Testing
- Test with VoiceOver (Mac)
- Test with NVDA (Windows)
- Test keyboard-only navigation
- Run axe-core accessibility audit

## File Location
Various components with accessibility improvements.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All interactions keyboard-accessible
- [ ] Focus management correct
- [ ] Screen reader tested
- [ ] axe-core passes
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T02:34:28.155299595-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T02:34:28.155299595-05:00","labels":["a11y","brenner-loop","session-ui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-reew.6","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-reew","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-04T02:34:28.156533298-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-reew.6","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-reew.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T02:35:23.467835665-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
